basket_policy.eligibility: A session requires consecutive valid adjusted closes and at least 75% member coverage.
basket_policy.historical_disclosure: Historical results use the current reviewed constituent basket unless historical membership versions are available.
basket_policy.weighting: Each eligible current-basket member receives equal weight at every eligible daily rebalance.

1d.percentage_unit: percent; raw daily returns are multiplied by 100 once for display

1m.percentage_unit: percent; raw daily returns are multiplied by 100 once for display

1w.percentage_unit: percent; raw daily returns are multiplied by 100 once for display

1y.percentage_unit: percent; raw daily returns are multiplied by 100 once for display

3m.percentage_unit: percent; raw daily returns are multiplied by 100 once for display
